info.name: Inventory System - API Collection
info.description:
Complete collection for the Multi-Branch Inventory Management System.

Base URL: http://localhost/api

Recommended execution order:
1. Auth > Login Admin (guarda tokens automaticamente)
2. Users > Create Operator (saves newUserId)
3. Products > Create Product (saves newProductId)
4. Branches > Create Branch (saves newBranchId)
5. Inventory > Initialize > Movements
6. Transfers > Full cycle PENDING > APPROVED > IN_TRANSIT > RECEIVED
7. Audit
8. Security

exec: pm.test('Status 403 (OPERATOR sin permiso en POST /products)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
